title: Plates
description: Turns item frames into plates for a perfect meal!
body:
Plates is a resource pack that turns item frames into plates, perfect for house decoration!\
You can put them on your table and place food and rotate it for your perfect meal!\
![Plates](https://i.postimg.cc/ZR3xFKwC/2025-01-31-16-02-00.png)\
(This is the [Serenity](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/serenity-1349110/) 16x16 house by MrFruitTree)\
Does not apply to item frames with maps!\
Enjoy!
